args:
set -eu
for path in \
  vllm/setup.py \
  vllm/tests/conftest.py \
  vllm/tests/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/collect_env.py \
  vllm/vllm/config/parallel.py \
  vllm/vllm/config/vllm.py \
  vllm/vllm/envs.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/e2e/spec_decode/test_spec_decode.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/core.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py
 do
  [ -f "$path" ]
 done
rg -n 'collect_env|parallel|spec_decode|gpu_model_runner|engine core|envs|setup.py|conftest' \
  vllm/setup.py \
  vllm/tests/conftest.py \
  vllm/tests/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/collect_env.py \
  vllm/vllm/config/parallel.py \
  vllm/vllm/config/vllm.py \
  vllm/vllm/envs.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/e2e/spec_decode/test_spec_decode.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/core.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py >/dev/null
fozzy explore tests/explore.cache_reuse_vs_rebuild.fozzy.json --json >/dev/null
printf 'explore-vllm-config-runtime\n'
